Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Class BankAccountInfo

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.BankAccountInfo
public class BankAccountInfo extends Object
Represents bank account information, commonly found in OFX data. This includes identifiers for the bank, the account itself, and the type of account. This class is designed for JAXB marshalling and unmarshalling of OFX XML elements.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    acctId
    The account identifier (i.e., account number).
    String
    acctType
    The type of account (e.g., CHECKING, SAVINGS, MONEYMRKT, CREDITLINE).
    String
    bankId
    The bank identifier (e.g., routing number).

  • Field Details

    • bankId

      public String bankId
      The bank identifier (e.g., routing number). Corresponds to the OFX tag <BANKID>.

    • acctId

      public String acctId
      The account identifier (i.e., account number). Corresponds to the OFX tag <ACCTID>.

    • acctType

      public String acctType
      The type of account (e.g., CHECKING, SAVINGS, MONEYMRKT, CREDITLINE). Corresponds to the OFX tag <ACCTTYPE>.

  • Constructor Details

    • BankAccountInfo

      public BankAccountInfo()
